caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, spiky grey wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. He wears a white collared shirt with a red bowtie and light-colored suspenders, and he has black over-ear headphones on. The background is a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and posters. A logo consisting of a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left and right sides of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions shift slightly; he begins with a neutral expression and a closed mouth, then opens his mouth to speak, and later develops a slight smile while continuing to talk. The camera remains stationary, keeping the man centered in a medium shot throughout the clip.
